title: User Authentication and Session Management
description: As a POS user, I need to be able to securely log in and out of the system so that I can access my authorized functionalities and protect sensitive data.
acceptance_criteria: Users can register a new account with a unique username and password.
Users can log in using their registered credentials.
Upon successful login, users receive an authentication token.
Users can log out, invalidating their current session.

title: Product and Inventory Management
description: As a shop owner, I need to manage my product catalog and track inventory levels so that I can accurately display available products and prevent overselling.
acceptance_criteria: Users can view a list of all products, including their name, price, and current stock.
Users can add new products by providing a name, price, and initial stock quantity.
Users can edit the name and price of existing products.
Users can manually adjust the stock level for any product.
The system accurately reflects product stock levels.

title: Sales Transaction Flow
description: As a cashier, I need to efficiently add items to a shopping cart, process payments, and complete sales transactions so that customers can quickly check out and receive a receipt.
acceptance_criteria: Users can add products to a shopping cart.
Users can remove products from the shopping cart.
The shopping cart displays the total price of all items.
Users can initiate the checkout process from the shopping cart.
Upon successful checkout, the system deducts the sold items from inventory.
Upon successful checkout, a digital receipt is generated and displayed.

title: Order History and Receipt Retrieval
description: As a shop owner, I need to view past sales transactions and retrieve receipts so that I can review sales performance and provide customer support.
acceptance_criteria: Users can view a list of all past sales transactions.
Users can view the detailed breakdown of items and total amount for any specific past transaction.
Users can retrieve and view the digital receipt for any past transaction.
